preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Prescription Type'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Germ Identification'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacteria'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Statut'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacteriology Culture Result'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'CultureCol'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacterial Count'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'colLeucore'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'vaginalAbondance'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'vaginalAspect'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'vaginalCouleur'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'vaginalAutre'
SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'uretreAspect'

changeSet.author: CIV developer Group

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Prescription Type' limit 1

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary ( id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, local_abbrev, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order, name_localization_id ) VALUES (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Internal Prescription',now(),'orderint',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Prescription Type' LIMIT 1),'label.internal_prescription',70000,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','External Prescription',now(),'orderext',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Prescription Type' LIMIT 1),'label.external_prescription',70001,NULL);

changeSet.author: CIV developer Group

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacteriology Culture Result' limit 1

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary ( id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, local_abbrev, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order, name_localization_id ) VALUES (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Contaminée',now(),'contaminee',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacteriology Culture Result' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.contamine',70010,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Negative',now(),'negative',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacteriology Culture Result' LIMIT 1), 'dictionary.bacterio.negative',70011,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Positive Nombre de germes isolés 1',now(),'Positivegerm1',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacteriology Culture Result' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.Positivegerm1',70012,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Positive Nombre de germes isolés 2',now(),'Positivegerm2',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'Bacteriology Culture Result' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.Positivegerm2',70013,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Positive Nombre de germes isolés 3',now(),'Positivegerm3',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description ='Bacteriology Culture Result' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.Positivegerm3',70014,NULL);

changeSet.author: CIV developer Group

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(*) FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'CultureCol' limit 1

changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO clinlims.dictionary ( id, is_active, dict_entry, lastupdated, local_abbrev, dictionary_category_id, display_key, sort_order, name_localization_id ) VALUES (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Negative',now(),'Negative',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'CultureCol' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.contamine',70010,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Positive',now(),'Positive',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'CultureCol' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.negative',70011,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Neisseria gonorrhoeae positive',now(),'gonoposi',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'CultureCol' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.Positivegerm1',70012,NULL), (nextval('dictionary_seq'),'Y','Neisseria gonorrhoeae Negative',now(),'gononega',(SELECT id FROM clinlims.dictionary_category WHERE description = 'CultureCol' LIMIT 1),'dictionary.bacterio.Positivegerm2',70013,NULL);
